metadata.description: Curated collection of production-ready Claude Code skills

plugins.name: hotfix
plugins.description: Stay on master, commit changed files, pull with rebase, push, and watch GitHub workflow runs

plugins.name: todo
plugins.description: Universal TODO and task tracker — manages tasks as markdown files in .tasks/ directory. Use /todo instead of built-in TaskCreate.

plugins.name: fix-last-run
plugins.description: Check the last GitHub Actions workflow run and fix failures

plugins.name: blue-ocean
plugins.description: Blue Ocean Strategy framework — stop competing, start creating uncontested market space

plugins.name: document-feature
plugins.description: Post-ship marketing documentation and page generation — ensures marketing site reflects shipped features

plugins.name: organizer
plugins.description: Organize files across Desktop, Downloads, and Documents with business-aware routing and move logging

plugins.name: diff-review
plugins.description: Adversarial git diff reviewer — finds bugs, performance issues, and correctness problems in changed code

plugins.name: app-distribution-guide
plugins.description: Design and build a multi-surface distribution layer — MCP server with OAuth, Claude and ChatGPT connectors, REST API/SDK, dashboard, and open source strategy

plugins.name: app-onboarding-questionnaire
plugins.description: Design and build a high-converting questionnaire-style app onboarding flow modelled on proven patterns from top subscription apps like Headspace, Noom, and Duolingo

plugins.name: astro-seo
plugins.description: Audits and improves SEO for Astro sites — technical foundation, structured data, sitemaps, IndexNow, Open Graph, hreflang, and more

plugins.name: backlinks
plugins.description: Find all domains linking to any domain using CommonCrawl hyperlinkgraph data and DuckDB

plugins.name: open-graph
plugins.description: Convert HTML/SVG designs or URLs into OG Shot TemplateDef JSON blobs ready to paste into the admin UI

plugins.name: rails
plugins.description: Rails developer toolkit — authentication (OAuth, 2FA, sessions), frontend (Bootstrap/Tailwind ERB), SEO (meta-tags, JSON-LD, sitemaps), Conductor workspace config, and pgsync database sync
